content:
# Old Qusaiba Outcrop

**Summary**: The primary field site for the study of the Sharawra Formation.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-abbas|Abbas, 2016]] conducted fieldwork at Old Qusaiba Village to sample three distinct outcrops.

- [[2017-mahgoub|Mahgoub, 2017]] analyzed fracture systems at the old-qusaiba-outcrop.

- [[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018]] studied the old-qusaiba-outcrop to characterize lithofacies and foraminiferal content.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2016-abbas|Abbas, 2016]] central Arabian arch

- [[2017-mahgoub|Mahgoub, 2017]] analyzed fracture systems at the old-qusaiba-outcrop.

- [[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018]] studied the old-qusaiba-outcrop to characterize lithofacies and foraminiferal content.

## Formations Present

- [[2016-abbas|Abbas, 2016]] Sharawra Formation

## Key Findings From This Location

- Three outcrops (Northwestern, Central, Southeastern) were identified and sampled. ([[2016-abbas|Abbas, 2016, p. 12]])

- The outcrop provided a clear view of multi-scale fractures and distinct lithofacies. ([[2017-mahgoub|Mahgoub, 2017, p. 71]])

- Two sections (Section 1 and Section 2) were identified near the site. ([[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018, p. 21]])
